summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard conservatively. No shared canonical exists for this inventory bucket. No GitHub mutations, merges, closes, labels, fix PRs, or post-merge actions are planned because instant close, low-signal close, merge, fix, and raise_pr are disabled and several open PRs need maintainer or author follow-up.
